name: Seafood Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the melted butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped green bell peppers, red bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, and celery to the skillet. Cook until vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, lightly beat the eggs and combine with Bisquick, milk, salt, Tabasco sauce, and grated cheese.
4. Add the shrimp or crabmeat to the egg mixture along with the cooked vegetables.
5. Pour the mixture into a prepared pie shell.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes.
7. If preparing ahead of time, bake for an additional 15 minutes.
